name: Tennessee Board for Licensing Contractors

agency.name: Tennessee Department of Commerce and Insurance

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official license verification system before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Tennessee contractor licenses and classifications exposed through the official Verify a License search

General, residential, commercial, industrial, electrical, mechanical, municipal utility, specialty, environmental, home-improvement, limited licensed electrician, and limited licensed plumber paths administered by the Board for Licensing Contractors
knownExclusions: Tennessee licensing thresholds, monetary limits, and county-specific home-improvement coverage must be preserved in any future normalized result.

The classification outline notes local permits, inspections, and companion requirements for some work, including TDEC, Fire Prevention, Department of Labor, and Alarm Systems Contractor Board references.
Local permits, business registrations, inspection records, and non-board authorizations are outside this source entry.
The official lookup is manual until access behavior, response stability, and reuse terms are adapter-reviewed.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer documented export options if discovered before considering lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official board and lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Tennessee contractor-board verification. The board's official classification outline covers every tracked statewide trade domain, but the lookup remains manual while access controls, response stability, and reuse terms are adapter-reviewed.
maintainerNotes: Do not flatten Tennessee license types without preserving monetary limits, project thresholds, county home-improvement applicability, and companion-agency requirements.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.
The official board page states that the board regulates contractors, home improvement contractors, limited licensed electricians, and limited licensed plumbers.
The official classification outline defines BC, CE, CMC, municipal utility, specialty, environmental, roofing, sheet-metal, swimming-pool, solar, asbestos, and home-improvement-relevant scopes.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
